channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Afterpay Day hasn't officially started yet — but these 20+ offers are already my favourites
item.description: The bi-annual sale is on the horizon, but that hasn't stopped many Australian retailers dropping deals early

item.title: MSI Prestige 14 AI+ review: a sleek business laptop with all-day battery life
item.description: The Prestige 14 AI+ is the latest slim but powerful business laptop from MSI that offers excellent battery life and portability.

item.title: I love the Shokz OpenRun headphones for running and cycling — but its Pro version is better, especially when discounted
item.description: The Shokz OpenRun Pro 2 combines bone conduction and open-ear headphone tech to provide better audio quality for exercising, and it’s 22% off in Amazon’s Big Smile Sale.

item.title: After reviewing several robot vacuums in the last 12 months, this is the model I'd buy — and it's got a significant price drop too
item.description: Hear me out — even with a 26% discount, the Roborock Saros 10R is expensive, but it's worth every cent.
